title: Correctly combining control modifiers in OptimizeAnnotated
notes: Nested control modifiers were combined in the wrong order, changing the circuit unitary.

title: Fix CommutationChecker for controlled rotation gates
notes: Controlled rotations could be misclassified as commuting, enabling an incorrect transformation.

title: Reject loopback edges in CouplingMap
notes: Invalid loopback CouplingMap edges needed early rejection to prevent a transpilation failure.

title: Fix TemplateOptimization dropping the global_phase on substitution
notes: Substitution lost the circuit global phase; an oracle modulo global phase cannot detect it.

title: Fix BasisTranslator processing of nested ControlFlowOp
notes: Nested control-flow blocks could skip BasisTranslator rewrites, leaving target translation incomplete.

title: Fix BreakLoopOp object has no attribute blocks bug
notes: BreakLoopOp traversal raised an AttributeError because the operation has no blocks attribute.

title: Fix reuse of ConsolidateBlocks instances
notes: Reusing ConsolidateBlocks across differently sized circuits leaked qubit-map state and could panic.

title: Fix VF2PostLayout with uncoupled qubits in strict_direction=True
notes: VF2PostLayout could fail during layout finalization for an active uncoupled or one-qubit wire.

title: Fix TranspileLayout.initial_index_layout with unordered virtuals
notes: initial_index_layout used dictionary enumeration order rather than the required virtual-qubit order.

title: Fix VF2 layout allocation with idle qubits
